# ================================================
# AGENT-GENERATED — DO NOT EDIT BY HAND
# Generated by esp32-sdd-full-project-generator skill
# Date: 2026-03-10 | Agent: Claude Code
# ================================================

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.24)

# include() BEFORE project() — ESP-IDF injects the cross-compiler via project.cmake
# which must load before CMake's project() call initialises the compiler.
# (See AIGenLessonsLearned.md — reversing this order silently breaks the build on macOS.)
include($ENV{IDF_PATH}/tools/cmake/project.cmake)

project(ble_beacon_deep_sleep)
